subject: [SDC] Update images for Guilin RC1
commit_message:

Patch Set 1:

I hate to say that but instantiation in Orange is broken as long as https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/114124 is not merged.

So either you rebase on top of the patch, either you redeploy hoping to be on azure gate, either you wait a little bit :(
